================================================================================
value_decl
================================================================================
x = a
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------

(file
  (value_declaration
    (decl_left
      (identifier_pattern
        (identifier)))
    body: (expr_body
      (variable_expr
        (identifier)))))

================================================================================
value_decl_nested
================================================================================
x = a
x =
{
	b=10
	b
    }
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------

(file
  (value_declaration
    (decl_left
      (identifier_pattern
        (identifier)))
    body: (expr_body
      (variable_expr
        (identifier))))
  (value_declaration
    (decl_left
      (identifier_pattern
        (identifier)))
    body: (expr_body
      (body_expression
        (value_declaration
          (decl_left
            (identifier_pattern
              (identifier)))
          body: (expr_body
            (const
              (int))))
        (variable_expr
          (identifier))))))

================================================================================
value_decl_typed
================================================================================
x :Int
x = a
x =
  {
  p:Int
  p=10
  p
  }
x =
  {
  p:Int
  p=
    10
  p
  }
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------

(file
  (value_declaration
    (annotation_type_def
      (annotation_pre_colon
        (identifier))
      (apply_type
        (concrete_type)))
    (decl_left
      (identifier_pattern
        (identifier)))
    body: (expr_body
      (variable_expr
        (identifier))))
  (value_declaration
    (decl_left
      (identifier_pattern
        (identifier)))
    body: (expr_body
      (body_expression
        (value_declaration
          (annotation_type_def
            (annotation_pre_colon
              (identifier))
            (apply_type
              (concrete_type)))
          (decl_left
            (identifier_pattern
              (identifier)))
          body: (expr_body
            (const
              (int))))
        (variable_expr
          (identifier)))))
  (value_declaration
    (decl_left
      (identifier_pattern
        (identifier)))
    body: (expr_body
      (body_expression
        (value_declaration
          (annotation_type_def
            (annotation_pre_colon
              (identifier))
            (apply_type
              (concrete_type)))
          (decl_left
            (identifier_pattern
              (identifier)))
          body: (expr_body
            (const
              (int))))
        (variable_expr
          (identifier))))))

================================================================================
value_record
================================================================================

{ result: commaResult, rest: nextBytes } = comma( beforeCommaOrBreak)
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------

(file
  (value_declaration
    (decl_left
      (record_pattern
        (record_field_pattern
          (field_name)
          (identifier_pattern
            (identifier)))
        (record_field_pattern
          (field_name)
          (identifier_pattern
            (identifier)))))
    body: (expr_body
      (function_call_pnc_expr
        caller: (variable_expr
          (identifier))
        args: (variable_expr
          (identifier))))))

================================================================================
value_field
================================================================================
a= Bool.field
a= {a}.field
a= ({a}).field
a= a.field.b.c.d
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------

(file
  (value_declaration
    (decl_left
      (identifier_pattern
        (identifier)))
    body: (expr_body
      (variable_expr
        (module)
        (identifier))))
  (value_declaration
    (decl_left
      (identifier_pattern
        (identifier)))
    body: (expr_body
      (field_access_expr
        target: (body_expression
          (variable_expr
            (identifier)))
        (identifier))))
  (value_declaration
    (decl_left
      (identifier_pattern
        (identifier)))
    body: (expr_body
      (field_access_expr
        target: (parenthesized_expr
          expression: (expr_body
            (body_expression
              (variable_expr
                (identifier)))))
        (identifier))))
  (value_declaration
    (decl_left
      (identifier_pattern
        (identifier)))
    body: (expr_body
      (field_access_expr
        target: (field_access_expr
          target: (field_access_expr
            target: (field_access_expr
              target: (variable_expr
                (identifier))
              (identifier))
            (identifier))
          (identifier))
        (identifier)))))

================================================================================
value_ignore
================================================================================
_= a
_a= a
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------

(file
  (value_declaration
    (decl_left
      (wildcard_pattern))
    body: (expr_body
      (variable_expr
        (identifier))))
  (value_declaration
    (decl_left
      (identifier_pattern
        (identifier)))
    body: (expr_body
      (variable_expr
        (identifier)))))

================================================================================
value_var
================================================================================
a:Str
var a= ""
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------

(file
  (var_declaration
    (annotation_type_def
      (annotation_pre_colon
        (identifier))
      (apply_type
        (concrete_type)))
    name: (identifier)
    body: (expr_body
      (const
        (string)))))

================================================================================
value_var_$
================================================================================
$a:Str
var $a= ""
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------

(file
  (var_declaration
    (annotation_type_def
      (annotation_pre_colon
        (identifier))
      (apply_type
        (concrete_type)))
    name: (identifier)
    body: (expr_body
      (const
        (string)))))

====
value_tuple
====
tup = ("Roc", 1)
----

(file
  (value_declaration
    (decl_left
      (identifier_pattern
        (identifier)))
    body: (expr_body
      (tuple_expr
        expr: (const
          (string))
        expr: (const
          (int))))))
